text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on our<n>way back to
the academy after a day<n>out, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Graaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've r-really done it now! I stepped<n>through the
school gate with my right<n>foot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You know the old adage, right?"When ye entereth a main gate, yemust steppeth leftly. Ye who dareth tobreaketh said rule..." Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Shalt reject the companion with<n>whom ye
walked through!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
D-does that mean that you and I are<n>going to have
a falling-out?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't let that happen, ever! There's<n>only one
thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And my fortune-telling shall tell us<n>what that is!
Hoppity-rak! Roll on, my<n>little fortune-telling pencil,
roll on!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She takes a pencil out of her pocket<n>and hastily
rolls it on the ground...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Apparently, a liquid will<n>solve our
worries!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Liquid... Liquid... Oh! Juice is a liquid!<n>Wait right
here, I'll go buy some!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She disappears for a moment and<n>comes back
with a bottle of my<n>favorite juice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The color of the label happens to be<n>today's lucky
color. Plus, it's the one<n>you always get!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's only because you're always<n>going out of
your way to help me!<n>Knowing what you like is the
least I<n>can do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how affable was your reaction<n>just now!
We've definitely avoided<n>any potential discord!
choice_data_list: Now, let me buy you one!
Now, let me buy you one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how affable was your reaction<n>just now!
We've definitely avoided<n>any potential discord!
choice_data_list: Now, let me buy you one!
Now, let me buy you one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huhwha?! There's no need to flatter<n>me that
much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you know what I think?<n>We've definitely
strengthened our<n>friendship!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We have the fortune-telling pencil to<n>thank for that!
Praise be to the pencil!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru must have liked<n>the
compliment. Afterwards, she<n>makes a habit of
bringing me drinks<n>every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat? You're going to buy me a<n>drink too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was just trying to prevent the<n>impending discord
between us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But if you insist... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
La-di-da! ♪ What a stroke of luck! All<n>thanks to my
pencil's divine<n>guidance! Now, what should I
choose?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Matikanefukukitaru and I<n>frequent the
vending machine on our<n>breaks more often.
